# Sale Report Hide Lines

This module allows you to hide the lines of the sales reports.

## Installation

To install this module, you need to:

1. Only install

## Configuration

To configure this module, you need to:

1. Nothing

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to the sales module
2. Create a new sale
3. Add a sales line
4. Check or uncheck the 'Show in Report' checkbox to show or hide the line in the sales report

## Bug Tracker

Bugs and errors are managed in [issues of GitHub](https://github.com/sygel-technology/sy-sale-reporting/issues).
In case of problems, please check if your problem has already been
reported. If you are the first to discover it, help us solving it by indicating
a detailed description [here](https://github.com/sygel-technology/sy-sale-reporting/issues/new).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.
